articles.title: I spent years forcing myself to finish The Witcher 3 —don’t repeat my mistake - Ars Technica
articles.description: Consensus and genre labels aren't reliable predictors of what you'll enjoy.

articles.author: Jeff Dunn
articles.title: Apple Memorial Day sales are here: We found sweet deals on MacBooks, AirPods, iPads and more - Yahoo Tech
articles.description: We're digging up the best deals on Apple devices we can find from this year's crop of Memorial Day sales.
articles.content: If you've been waiting for a discount before taking the plunge on a new MacBook, Apple Watch or set of AirPods, allow us to help. We've dug through the many Memorial Day sales going on around the web… [+6753 chars]
